entries.claim_text: GSM8K to GSM-Symbolic accuracy drop per model
entries.quoted_snippet: The performance of all state-of-the-art models on \gsmsymb~drops compared to \gsm.

entries.claim_text: GSM8K to GSM-NoOp accuracy drop per model
entries.quoted_snippet: The performance of models drops significantly on \gsmnoop, with more recent models experiencing a greater decline than older ones.

entries.claim_text: 包含 7473 個訓練題與 1319 個測試題
entries.quoted_snippet: divided into 7473 training and 1319 test examples

entries.claim_text: 不如把它看成一個分布
entries.quoted_snippet: viewing LLM performance as a distribution across various problem instances provides deeper insights

entries.claim_text: 每個樣板定義三件事：變數、變數的定義域
entries.quoted_snippet: identifying variables, their domains, and necessary conditions

entries.claim_text: range(5, 100)
entries.quoted_snippet: range(5, 100)

entries.claim_text: 保證每次隨機抽樣出的實例都自洽
entries.quoted_snippet: we deliberately select numerical ranges that closely align with those in the original

entries.claim_text: 就得到 Figure 1 左邊的題目
entries.quoted_snippet: Let T be the number of bouncy balls in the tube.
Let T be the number of bouncy balls in the tube.

entries.claim_text: 同一個樣板生成 50 個實例
entries.quoted_snippet: using 100 templates and generating 50 samples per template, resulting in 5000 total examples

entries.claim_text: 每個模型的準確率都有不可忽視的變異
entries.quoted_snippet: this holds for 21 out of 25 models

entries.claim_text: 污染嫌疑最重的老模型
entries.quoted_snippet: The performance of all state-of-the-art models on \gsmsymb~drops compared to \gsm.

entries.claim_text: 移除一個子句得到 M1
entries.quoted_snippet: as the difficulty increases, the performance decreases and the variance increases

entries.claim_text: 這是全文最有殺傷力的實驗
entries.quoted_snippet: seemingly relevant but ultimately inconsequential statements

entries.claim_text: 週五摘 44 顆奇異果
entries.quoted_snippet: Oliver picks 44 kiwis on Friday. Then he picks 58 kiwis on Saturday.

entries.claim_text: 正解應忽略「五顆比較小」這句廢話
entries.quoted_snippet: 44 (Friday) + 58 (Saturday) + 83 (Sunday) = 185

entries.claim_text: Phi-3-mini 掉超過 65%
entries.quoted_snippet: Phi-3-mini model experiencing over a 65

entries.claim_text: 無法用 few-shot 救回
entries.quoted_snippet: the performance remains within the standard deviation, even with 8 shots

entries.claim_text: 全部取自 GSM8K 測試集
entries.quoted_snippet: we verify that at least two models answer each question correctly

entries.claim_text: 符號樣板與擾動評估並非本文首創
entries.quoted_snippet: lacks symbolic templates and has a fixed size and difficulty

entries.claim_text: 能力越強的模型退化越小
entries.quoted_snippet: current LLMs are not capable of genuine logical reasoning
